Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Changelog: Added Pricing Guards — optional max price increase cap to prevent overpricing when competition delists, and relative outlier window scaling for thin markets. Taskbar flashes when a pinch run completes while alt-tabbed.
